title: Legendary Dungeons Dependencies
description: All the main dependencies for my legendary dungeons datapack
body:
This is a simple little modpack with the mods recommended to be used alongside the Legendary Dungeons Datapack. A key thing to note is that the Fight or Flight Reborn mod is properly configured to provide the correct type of aggression for the enemy pokemon that spawn. (To do it manually, change "do_pokemon_attack_unprovoked" to true in the fightorflight.json5 file )

I encourage people to add whatever extra datapacks / mods they want alongside Legendary Dungeons, these are just the bare bones basics.

- For those who don't know how to install AllTheMons x MegaShowdown, please visit their datapack's modrinth page for instructions. https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy
